scripts.build:server: pyinstaller --onefile --name grimoire-server --distpath build/server --add-data core;core --add-data pipeline;pipeline --add-data rag;rag --hidden-import uvicorn.logging --hidden-import uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.websockets.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan.on --hidden-import lancedb --hidden-import pyarrow --hidden-import voyageai server/main.py
scripts.build:all: npm run build:server && npm run build:copy && npm run build && npm run tauri build
